hero.thesis: Human intelligence plus artificial intelligence, aligned to create greater worth.
hero.headline: Make Work Worth Doing
hero.subcopy: DudeWorth helps leaders strengthen the people, workflows, and decisions that move the business forward through fractional leadership, expert advisory, hiring support, and practical AI upskilling.
hero.definition: It is not about replacing people or outsourcing judgment. It is about aligning human intelligence with artificial intelligence so teams can apply what they know faster, share it more clearly, and scale the work that creates worth.
hero.brandLine: Fractional leadership | Expert advisory | Hiring support | Workflow upskilling

pressure.title: What makes work worthy?
pressure.body: Leaders are not just buying AI or hiring help. They are trying to reduce confusion, raise capability, and help people make better decisions with less drag.

items.title: Worthy of your team's attention.
items.body: The work should matter enough that people understand why it deserves focus.
items.hook: Focus is expensive. Spend it well.

deepDive.pain: Teams are already carrying too many priorities, meetings, and half-finished improvements.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth helps separate useful work from noise so attention goes where it can change decisions.
deepDive.outcome: Together, we can make the next move visible, owned, and worth the team's focus.

items.title: Worthy of the customer.
items.body: Better internal work should show up as clearer answers, fewer misses, and more trust.

deepDive.pain: When handoffs are unclear, customers feel the delay before leaders see the root cause.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth maps the work behind the customer experience and strengthens the places trust breaks.
deepDive.outcome: Together, we can turn cleaner internal work into clearer answers and fewer avoidable misses.

items.title: Worthy of being automated.
items.body: Only repeatable, useful work should become automation. Bad process should not be made faster.

deepDive.pain: Automation can make bad process faster, louder, and harder to unwind.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth tests whether the workflow is clear enough to automate and where human judgment must stay in the loop.
deepDive.outcome: Together, we can automate only the work that earns trust and gives people time back.

items.title: Worthy of the next hire.
items.body: Before adding people, clarify what judgment, ownership, and capability the business actually needs.
items.hook: Hiring should solve the right work.

deepDive.pain: A vague role turns hiring into hope and makes the new person inherit unclear work.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth clarifies the operating need before the role, contractor, or fractional seat is defined.
deepDive.outcome: Together, we can make the next hire or fractional support worthy of the cost and trust.

method.title: The Worth Test
method.body: DudeWorth pressure-tests work before recommending a person, process, dashboard, automation, or AI move.

steps.title: Listen
steps.hook: Most projects start one layer too late.

deepDive.pain: Leaders often get handed symptoms: late answers, tool fatigue, missed handoffs, or hiring pressure.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth keeps the conversation anchored until the real operating question is named.
deepDive.outcome: A cleaner problem statement before money, time, or reputation gets committed.

steps.title: Map
steps.body: Where does the work lose clarity?
steps.hook: The break is usually between people.

deepDive.pain: Work loses worth when ownership, data, timing, or decision rights disappear between steps.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth maps the actual handoffs, not the imaginary clean version in a slide.
deepDive.outcome: A shared view of where clarity is leaking and what can be fixed first.

steps.title: Choose
steps.body: Does it need a person, process, dashboard, automation, or AI?
steps.hook: The answer is not always a tool.

deepDive.pain: AI, dashboards, automation, hires, and consultants all fail when chosen before the work is understood.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth pressure-tests the options against the outcome, risk, adoption, and human judgment required.
deepDive.outcome: A practical recommendation instead of another fashionable initiative.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Can the team actually use it?

deepDive.pain: Good ideas fail when they add steps, confuse owners, or feel like one more thing to manage.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth builds small enough to be tried and clear enough to be used.
deepDive.outcome: A usable workflow, dashboard, record, or operating habit people can actually adopt.

steps.title: Prove
steps.body: Did it improve decisions, speed, trust, or capability?

deepDive.pain: Without proof, teams keep debating whether the change helped or just looked good.
deepDive.choice: DudexOS goal loops keep the work tied to evidence, next actions, and observable outcomes.
deepDive.outcome: A clear keep, change, or stop decision based on what the work actually improved.

items.title: Fractional COO / Operating Partner
items.hook: The business is moving. The operating rhythm is not.
items.body: For moments when the business needs experienced operating judgment without waiting for a full-time executive hire.

deepDive.pain: Growth creates more handoffs, more decisions, and more places for work to stall.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth brings operating cadence without making you wait for the perfect executive hire.
deepDive.outcome: Clear priorities, cleaner ownership, and a leadership rhythm people can actually follow.

items.title: Contract or Direct-Hire Support
items.hook: The wrong hire makes the work heavier.
items.body: For teams that need the right person, role clarity, or hiring signal more than another tool.

deepDive.pain: Hiring pressure gets expensive when the role is fuzzy or the signal is weak.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth clarifies the work first, then helps define the person who can carry it.
deepDive.outcome: Better role shape, sharper candidate conversations, and less guesswork around operator fit.
deepDive.cta: Clarify the role before the hire

items.title: Expert Network / SME Advisory
items.hook: You need signal before the meeting ends.
items.body: For buyers who need clear, practical perspective fast from someone who understands operations under pressure.

deepDive.pain: High-stakes questions do not need buzzwords. They need grounded operating judgment quickly.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth translates complex operational and AI-adjacent topics into practical buyer signal.
deepDive.outcome: Cleaner questions, sharper risk reads, and perspective that helps the next decision.

items.title: HI+AI Workflow Upskilling
items.hook: AI only helps when people trust the work.
items.body: For teams that need to use AI without losing human judgment, accountability, or trust in the work.

deepDive.pain: Teams are being told to use AI, but unclear workflows turn new tools into more noise.
deepDive.choice: DudeWorth starts with the human work, then applies AI where it strengthens judgment and visibility.
deepDive.outcome: People learn faster, decisions become easier to explain, and automation earns trust.
deepDive.cta: Upskill the work, not the hype

proof.title: Real-world work. Measurable worth. Delivered.
proof.body: DudeWorth is grounded in logistics, manufacturing, customer operations, automation, and leadership under pressure.

items.label: real work
items.body: Experience where handoffs, ownership, service, and execution had to hold up every day.

items.label: human intelligence
items.body: The work starts with judgment, capability, communication, and trust before any tool choice.

items.label: practical clarity
items.body: Dashboards, records, automation, and AI are useful only when they make decisions easier.

items.label: worthy work
items.body: The standard is simple: less confusion, stronger operators, faster answers, and better decisions.

internal.title: DudexOS makes agentic intelligence worth trusting.
internal.body: DudeWorth uses DudexOS to support agentic work with discipline, evidence, and clear next actions. At the center is Core, a team of specialized, co-working agents that keep goals, context, and proof moving together until the output can be trusted. That discipline matters because worthy outcomes are traceable, useful, and clear enough for people to act on.

contact.title: Make the next move worthy of your team’s focus.
contact.body: We will help you decide whether the next move is leadership, hiring support, expert perspective, workflow cleanup, dashboard visibility, automation, or practical AI upskilling.
